---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new capability or service feature for AIRS
title: "feat([scope]): "
labels: ["type:feature"]
assignees: ""
---

## 📖 User Story
As a **[User Role: e.g., On-Call Engineer, SRE, Developer]**,
I want to **[Action to take in system]**
So that **[Outcome/benefit received]**.

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution / Architectural Strategy
Provide a detailed explanation of the proposed changes and system components involved:
* Target Directory: `[ai-service | backend-service | frontend-service | docs]`
* Modified Files/Components: `[e.g., app/agents/planner.py, config/SecurityConfig.java]`
* Logic Details: Describe how the new code will interact with existing graph state or REST APIs.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
List measurable points to consider the feature complete:
- [ ] Criteria 1: e.g. "REST endpoint returns HTTP 200 with the required payload."
- [ ] Criteria 2: e.g. "ChromaDB stores new embedding dimension properly."
- [ ] Criteria 3: e.g. "Unit test coverage is > 80%."

---

## 💬 Additional Context
Add any links, diagrams, screenshots, or runbook snippets that help clarify this feature.
